task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Replace the current agent feed display with an animated processing screen using the KOMMIT O icon.

When processing is true, show:
1. The O icon centered: <img src="/Kommit_Icon.png" /> with a slow rotation animation (CSS keyframes, 4s linear infinite)
2. A "show agents" toggle link below the O
3. When toggled open, show the agent feed as a list — each entry shows: character name + what they decided. Example: "Gus Fring — Safe to proceed" or "Hannibal — Anxiety detected. Key themes: promotion, visibility"
4. Agent feed entries fade in one by one as they arrive

When processing is false and card exists, hide the O and show the card.

Add CSS keyframes for the rotation:
@keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

Apply: style={{ animation: 'spin 4s linear infinite', width: 120, height: 120 }}

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
O icon animates during processing
Show/hide agent feed toggle works
Agent entries show character name + decision
Card shows when processing complete
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: break voice or submit logic
DO NOT: use ast.parse
